strengths: 10+ years of full-stack production experience with primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) across multiple roles and at scale
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, directly addressing a required skill
Proven architecture and systems design expertise: built microservices handling millions of requests/second, AWS infrastructure, containerization, and developer tooling
concerns: Testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not explicitly mentioned despite demonstrated strong TDD philosophy and testing-focused workshops

response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 10+ years across the primary tech stack and current work on AI-agent infrastructure (a required skill). Demonstrates solid architecture, systems design, and testing craftsmanship. Primary gaps are lack of explicit Nest.js, Jest/Vitest/Playwright, and PostgreSQL mentions, though these appear learnable given the strong foundation and demonstrated history of rapid technology adoption.
